updates.title: Agent Dashboard Created
updates.summary: Operational dashboard for AI agent fleet deployed to GitHub Pages. Tracks agent status, task queue, and knowledge base updates in real time.

updates.title: Full Automation Pipeline Deployed
updates.summary: Content pipeline now running 24/7. Pulls from Zoom (all 7 users), GHL (call recordings), Slack (15 channels), Discord (151 channels). Hourly cron ingests new content → classifies → KB gate (only meaningful knowledge stored) → alert detection (fires tag Chandler instantly). 6pm daily Slack report, Monday 8am weekly report. Loom skipped — API deprecated.
